name: ui-ux-compass
description: Routes frontend coding conversations through UI/UX intent capture, risk-based clarification, implementation gates, review, and acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Design-intent routing for frontend UI work
interface.longDescription: Detects when coding work enters UI/UX territory, captures design intent, asks the minimum useful questions, and gates implementation with UI specs and review checklists.
defaultPrompt: Use UI/UX Compass before adding a dashboard page.
Use UI/UX Compass to review why this UI feels wrong.
Use UI/UX Compass before implementing a user-facing flow.
